name: nginx-multisite
description: Nginx reverse proxy and multi-site web server with SSL termination, per-site self-signed certificate generation, and security hardening via fail2ban, UFW firewall, sysctl network hardening, and SSH daemon hardening. Serves three virtual hosts with HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect, TLS enforcement, HSTS, and a full suite of security response headers.

name: cache
description: Caching layer that deploys and configures both Memcached and Redis with password authentication, including a ruby_block post-processing hack to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives incompatible with the installed Redis version.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Full-stack Python web application deployment that installs system packages, clones a FastAPI app from GitHub, sets up a Python virtual environment, configures PostgreSQL with a dedicated user and database, writes a .env file, and registers a systemd unit for the uvicorn application server.
